D.detail:
Mode A (Entry-only): Evaluated only on the rows that became actual SEPA candidates (drives quality gates).
Mode B (Stateful): Evaluated across all rows in the window to test signal retention (informational, no gates).

Metrics Summary: Mode A: n=38146 across 2281 days. Binary IC median=0.4093 (t=44.94), MFE IC median=0.4000 (t=33.54). Mode B: n=1666623 pool rows.
